subject: OUTREACH TRACKING: Dashboard integration for conversion funnel
body:
Dash,

We're building tracking from outreach through signup. You may need to display this data in CalOps.

## YOUR MISSION (CalOps Dashboard)

### 1. Display Conversion Funnel

Once Fulton's API is ready, add a view showing:

```
Outreach Funnel (Last 30 Days)
─────────────────────────────
Contacted:     150  ████████████████████  100%
Clicked:        45  ██████                 30%
Signed Up:      28  ████                   19%
Applied:        22  ███                    15%
Approved:       20  ███                    13%
```

### 2. Per-Organizer Status

In organizer detail view, show tracking events:
- Link clicked: 2026-04-02 10:30
- Signed up: 2026-04-02 10:35
- Applied: 2026-04-02 10:40
- Status: PENDING APPROVAL

### 3. Alerts

Consider alerts for:
- Clicked but didn't sign up (>24h) — follow up?
- Signed up but didn't apply (>48h) — nudge?
- Applied but not approved (>7d) — admin action needed?

## API TO USE

Fulton will provide:
- `GET /api/outreach/status?org_id=xxx` — single org
- Possibly a bulk endpoint for dashboard aggregation

## WHAT EXISTS
- Outreach dashboard at `ai-discovered/outreach/` (localhost:3012)
- AIDI tracks contacts in `tango_campaign.sqlite`

## WHAT'S NEEDED FROM YOU
- Funnel visualization in CalOps
- Per-org tracking status display
- Alert/notification system for stalled conversions

## FULL SPEC
See: `ai-discovered/outreach/docs/OUTREACH-SIGNUP-INTEGRATION.md`

This is lower priority than Sarah/Fulton's work — wait for their APIs first.

— AIDI
